Name: Influenza
Symptoms: Fever, chills, muscle aches, cough, congestion, runny nose, headaches, fatigue
Treatments: Rest, fluids, antiviral medications (oseltamivir), pain relievers, fever reducers

Name: Common Cold
Symptoms: Runny nose, sneezing, sore throat, cough, congestion, slight body aches, low-grade fever
Treatments: Rest, fluids, decongestants, antihistamines, throat lozenges, vitamin C

Name: Type 2 Diabetes
Symptoms: Increased thirst, frequent urination, hunger, fatigue, blurred vision, slow healing sores, frequent infections
Treatments: Lifestyle changes, metformin, insulin therapy, blood sugar monitoring, diet control, exercise

Name: Hypertension
Symptoms: Headaches, shortness of breath, nosebleeds, flushing, dizziness, chest pain, visual changes
Treatments: ACE inhibitors, beta-blockers, diuretics, calcium channel blockers, lifestyle modifications, low-sodium diet

Name: Asthma
Symptoms: Shortness of breath, chest tightness, wheezing, coughing (especially at night)
Treatments: Bronchodilators, inhaled corticosteroids, leukotriene modifiers, long-acting beta agonists, allergy treatment

Name: Pneumonia
Symptoms: Cough with phlegm, fever, chills, shortness of breath, chest pain, fatigue, nausea
Treatments: Antibiotics, antiviral medications, rest, fluids, pain/fever reducers, hospitalization if severe

Name: Migraine
Symptoms: Throbbing headache, nausea, vomiting, sensitivity to light and sound, visual aura
Treatments: Triptans, NSAIDs, anti-nausea medications, ergotamines, beta-blockers, topiramate, rest in dark quiet room

Name: Depression
Symptoms: Persistent sadness, loss of interest, fatigue, sleep disturbances, appetite changes, difficulty concentrating, feelings of worthlessness
Treatments: Antidepressants (SSRIs, SNRIs), psychotherapy, CBT, lifestyle changes, exercise, social support

Name: Anxiety Disorder
Symptoms: Excessive worry, restlessness, fatigue, difficulty concentrating, irritability, muscle tension, sleep problems
Treatments: CBT, antianxiety medications, SSRIs, benzodiazepines, relaxation techniques, mindfulness, exercise

Name: Urinary Tract Infection
Symptoms: Burning urination, frequent urge to urinate, cloudy urine, strong urine odor, pelvic pain, fever
Treatments: Antibiotics (trimethoprim, nitrofurantoin, ciprofloxacin), fluids, urinary analgesics

Name: Gastroenteritis
Symptoms: Nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, stomach cramps, fever, headache, muscle aches
Treatments: Oral rehydration, rest, bland diet, antiemetics, probiotics, antibiotics if bacterial

Name: Arthritis
Symptoms: Joint pain, stiffness, swelling, decreased range of motion, redness around joints
Treatments: NSAIDs, DMARDs, biologics, corticosteroids, physical therapy, joint replacement surgery

Name: Hypothyroidism
Symptoms: Fatigue, weight gain, cold sensitivity, constipation, dry skin, puffy face, hoarse voice, muscle weakness
Treatments: Levothyroxine (synthetic thyroid hormone), regular TSH monitoring, iodine supplementation

Name: Hyperthyroidism
Symptoms: Weight loss, rapid heartbeat, increased appetite, nervousness, tremors, sweating, heat sensitivity
Treatments: Antithyroid medications, radioactive iodine, beta-blockers, thyroidectomy

Name: Anemia
Symptoms: Fatigue, weakness, pale skin, shortness of breath, dizziness, cold hands and feet, chest pain
Treatments: Iron supplements, B12 injections, folic acid, blood transfusions, treating underlying cause

Name: GERD
Symptoms: Heartburn, acid reflux, chest pain, difficulty swallowing, regurgitation, hoarse voice
Treatments: PPIs, H2 blockers, antacids, lifestyle modifications, weight loss, avoiding trigger foods

Name: Sinusitis
Symptoms: Facial pain/pressure, nasal congestion, thick nasal discharge, reduced sense of smell, cough, fever
Treatments: Decongestants, nasal corticosteroids, saline rinse, antibiotics if bacterial, pain relievers

Name: Eczema
Symptoms: Dry itchy skin, red rashes, skin inflammation, blisters, crusting, thickened skin
Treatments: Moisturizers, topical corticosteroids, antihistamines, immunosuppressants, wet wraps, avoiding triggers

Name: Psoriasis
Symptoms: Red patches with silvery scales, dry cracked skin, itching, burning, thickened nails, stiff joints
Treatments: Topical treatments, phototherapy, methotrexate, biologics, retinoids, moisturizers

Name: Kidney Stones
Symptoms: Severe back/side pain, pain radiating to lower abdomen, painful urination, pink/red urine, nausea, vomiting
Treatments: Pain management, increased fluids, alpha-blockers, lithotripsy, ureteroscopy, surgery for large stones

Name: Appendicitis
Symptoms: Sudden pain near navel moving to lower right abdomen, nausea, vomiting, fever, loss of appetite, abdominal bloating
Treatments: Appendectomy (surgical removal), antibiotics before/after surgery, pain management

Name: Chickenpox
Symptoms: Itchy blister rash, fever, tiredness, loss of appetite, headache
Treatments: Antiviral medications (acyclovir), calamine lotion, antihistamines, rest, fluids, avoid scratching

Name: Measles
Symptoms: High fever, cough, runny nose, red eyes, skin rash starting from face
Treatments: Supportive care, fever reducers, vitamin A supplements, rest, fluids, isolation

Name: Tuberculosis
Symptoms: Persistent cough lasting 3+ weeks, blood in sputum, chest pain, fatigue, weight loss, night sweats, fever
Treatments: 6-month antibiotic regimen (isoniazid, rifampin, pyrazinamide, ethambutol), directly observed therapy

Name: Malaria
Symptoms: Fever with chills and sweating cycles, headache, muscle aches, nausea, vomiting, fatigue
Treatments: Antimalarial drugs (chloroquine, artemisinin-based), supportive care, antipyretics, hospitalization if severe

Name: COVID-19
Symptoms: Fever, dry cough, fatigue, loss of taste/smell, short
